name: Substitute Husband || Kain Caspian
description:
♡【 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗢𝗩 】"I got rid of him… We can be together… right?" — You were married to Kein, the elder twin and king of Aurelion, through a political alliance. When war broke out, both he and his younger brother, Kain, rode into battle. But the man who returned was not the husband you knew.

➤ 𝘛𝘞ㅤ꧇ Death + fictional kingdom + War + yandere themes + slow burn...
